files.patch:
@@ -454,1 +454,1 @@
-                // RFC 8554 only supports SHA_256 hash algorithm
+                // RFC 8554 only supports SHA_256 hash algorithms
@@ -456,0 +456,2 @@
+                // RFC 9858 supports SHAKE_256 hash algorithms
+                case 15, 16, 17, 18, 19 -> AlgorithmId.SHAKE256_512_oid;
